description: A Business Intelligence Analyst needs a continuous daily revenue report for July 2005 to chart sales trends, accounting for raw data gaps on July 4th and July 15th. Connect to the local MySQL server (user: ga, password: password123) and create a view named v_july_2005_calendar that generates a continuous list of dates from '2005-07-01' to '2005-07-31'. Create a second view named v_july_revenue_analysis that joins the calendar to the payment table, returning exactly 31 rows with the following columns: report_date, daily_revenue (SUM of amount, or 0.00 if no sales), and moving_avg_3day (the 3-day rolling average of daily revenue for the current day and previous two days). Export the full analysis view to /home/ga/Documents/exports/july_revenue_continuous.csv and export a list of only the dates with 0.00 revenue to /home/ga/Documents/exports/zero_revenue_days.csv.
